<div class="home-hero-eyebrow">

<span class="home-hero-dot"></span> Redpanda Documentation

</div>

# Everything you need to move data and put agents to work on it.

Guides, concepts, and references for the two platforms that power Redpanda: streaming your data reliably and letting AI agents act on it safely.

<span class="home-hero-ask-icon" aria-hidden="true"> ![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,) </span>

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

<div class="home-hero-ask-hints">

<span class="home-hero-ask-hints-label">Try:</span>

How do I connect Salesforce as an MCP source?

Set a monthly token budget

Deploy Redpanda on Kubernetes

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="section home-intent">

<div class="home-intent-container">

## What are you here for

<div class="home-intent-grid">

<div class="home-intent-card home-intent-card--adp home-intent-card--expanded home-intent-card--clickable" style="--adp-color: #C1331A;" data-href="#">

<div class="home-intent-card-header-row">

<div class="home-intent-card-icon home-intent-card-icon--brand">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card-content">

### Build agentic data flows

Build, connect, and govern AI agents on top of your data. Create agents without code, plug in Salesforce or your database, and keep every action observable and in-policy.

</div>

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card-visual">

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card-links">

<a href="../agentic-data-plane/get-started/adp-quickstart/" class="home-intent-card-link"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMTQiIGhlaWdodD0iMTQiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyNCAyNCIgZmlsbD0ibm9uZSIgc3Ryb2tlPSJjdXJyZW50Q29sb3IiIHN0cm9rZS13aWR0aD0iMiI+PHBhdGggZD0iTTIyIDExLjA4VjEyYTEwIDEwIDAgMSAxLTUuOTMtOS4xNCIgLz48cG9seWxpbmUgcG9pbnRzPSIyMiA0IDEyIDE0LjAxIDkgMTEuMDEiPjwvcG9seWxpbmU+PC9zdmc+" /> <span>Get started</span></a> <a href="../agentic-data-plane/home/" class="home-intent-card-link"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /> <span>Documentation</span></a>

</div>

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card home-intent-card--expanded home-intent-card--clickable" data-href="#">

<div class="home-intent-card-header-row">

<div class="home-intent-card-icon">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyB3aWR0aD0iMjAiIGhlaWdodD0iMjAiIHZpZXdib3g9IjAgMCAyNCAyNCIgZmlsbD0ibm9uZSIgc3Ryb2tlPSJjdXJyZW50Q29sb3IiIHN0cm9rZS13aWR0aD0iMS43NSIgc3Ryb2tlLWxpbmVjYXA9InJvdW5kIiBzdHJva2UtbGluZWpvaW49InJvdW5kIj4KICAgICAgICAgICAgICA8cGF0aCBkPSJNMjIgMTJoLTRsLTMgOUw5IDNsLTMgOUgyIiAvPgogICAgICAgICAgICA8L3N2Zz4=)

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card-content">

### Stream and process data

Run Redpanda clusters, move data reliably between systems, and keep storage lean with Tiered Storage and connectors.

</div>

</div>

<div class="home-intent-card-products">

<div class="home-intent-card-products-label">

Data Platform

</div>
